leadText: Tangling Hair (Japanese: カーリーヘアー Curly Hair) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Alolan Diglett and Alolan Dugtrio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokémon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tangling Hair has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
